parsed.production_notes: The video combines human-recorded footage for the initial interview with a 3D-animated/AI-generated robot character. In the split-screen segment, the human subject's lip movements appear AI-manipulated or dubbed to match the English audio, lacking natural synchronization.

characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, fair complexion, blonde hair with bangs. Distinguishing marks: tattoos on her left arm.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeve crop top, light blue jeans, silver cross necklace.
Beige and brown patterned hijab and matching traditional dress (salwar kameez).
characters.demeanor: Initially hesitant, then confident, happy, and engaged.

characters.appearance: White, humanoid robot with a smooth metallic face, blue eyes, and a glowing blue circular core on its chest.

scenes.setting: Inside a glass observation pod on the London Eye, daytime. Big Ben and the River Thames visible in the background. Bright, natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with blonde hair and tattoos on her arm stands on the right, holding a black microphone towards a middle-aged woman on the left. The middle-aged woman is wearing a patterned hijab and traditional dress. They are inside a glass-walled observation pod. Through the glass, a river, a bridge, and a large clock tower are visible in the background under a clear sky. Other people are blurred in the background of the pod. The lighting is bright and natural.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a street-style interview taking place inside a London Eye pod. The interviewer asks questions, and the interviewee responds, explaining her past struggles with English and how an app helped her. Text overlays show the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A: What did your English being bad actually stop you from doing?
Character B: Everything. I couldn't go to the shop alone. I couldn't talk to my kids' teacher. I couldn't make a phone call without asking my husband first.
Character A: So what changed?
Character B: My sister-in-law showed me this app. It's like having an English teacher on your phone. Now I handle everything myself. Let me show you.
scenes.on_screen_text:
What did your English being bad actually stop you from doing? 🇬🇧
Everything.
I couldn't go to the shop alone.
I couldn't talk to my kids' teacher.
I couldn't make a phone call without asking my husband first.
So what changed?
My sister-in-law showed me this app.
It's like having an English teacher on your phone.
Now I handle everything myself.
Let me show you.
Learna AI

panels.panel_visual_description: A white, humanoid robot with a glowing blue circular core on its chest stands on the left side of the frame. It has a smooth, metallic face with blue eyes. To the right of the robot, a large smartphone is displayed vertically. The background is a blurred, indistinct interior setting. The lighting is studio-like, highlighting the robot and the phone.

scenes.visual_description: A 3D animated robot introduces the language learning app. A smartphone screen appears next to the robot, displaying various features of the app, including the app store page, the main interface, and a selection of AI tutors. Text overlays emphasize the app's benefits.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character C: Wait. Did you know you can speak English like a native in just one week? It's not magic, it's Learna, the app that corrects you as you speak and teaches you without you even noticing. Let's try it together.
scenes.on_screen_text:

scenes.setting: Split screen. Top: solid black background. Bottom: Inside the London Eye pod, daytime.
scenes.camera: Split-screen. Top: close-up. Bottom: medium close-up.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up of a white, humanoid robot's head and shoulders against a solid black background. The robot has a smooth face, blue eyes, and a glowing blue circle on its chest. Concentric white sound wave graphics emanate from the robot's head.

A middle-aged woman wearing a patterned hijab and traditional dress stands facing forward. She is inside a glass-walled observation pod. Through the glass behind her, a river, a bridge, and a large clock tower are visible under a clear sky. The lighting is bright and natural.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half shows the AI robot tutor, and the bottom half shows the woman from the interview. They engage in a simulated conversation where the AI corrects her English. Text overlays display their dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C: Do you speak English?
Character B: A little bit.
Character C: Where do you live?
Character B: I am London.
Character C: Almost. You should say, I live in London.
Character B: I always mix that up.
Character C: That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly.
Character B: But I don't have any money.
Character C: You don't need money. With Learna, you can practice English for free. It is not like other expensive apps or courses.
Character B: Are you serious?
Character C: Absolutely. No tricks, just real conversation practice with your AI tutor.
Character B: Like, a real tutor?
Character C: Yes, I correct your grammar, your pronunciation, and help you speak with confidence.
Character B: Okay. I am going to download Learna right now.
Character C: Great decision. Let's speak English together.
scenes.on_screen_text:

Are you serious?
Absolutely.
No tricks, just real conversation practice with your AI tutor.
Like, a real tutor?
Yes, I correct your grammar, your pronunciation, and help you speak with confidence.
Okay.
I am going to download Learna right now.
Great decision.
Let's speak English together.
Learna AI

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid dark blue background. In the center, there is a square app icon featuring the face of a white humanoid robot.

scenes.visual_description: A standard end card with a solid blue background. It displays the app icon, the app name, a call to action to download, and badges for the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
